items.experience: Minimum 2 years teaching middle and secondary levels
items.title: TGT Mathematics
items.description: Deliver conceptual mathematics instruction, build problem-solving confidence, and support students in class projects and Olympiad preparation.

items.experience: Minimum 3 years in Higher Secondary teaching
items.qualification: Master's Degree in English with B.Ed
items.title: PGT English
items.description: Lead English instruction for senior secondary classes, design assessment strategies, and mentor students for board readiness and communication excellence.

items.experience: Minimum 2 years in admissions or school counseling
items.qualification: Graduate in any discipline; education counseling certification preferred
items.title: Admissions Counselor
items.description: Guide families through the admissions journey, coordinate enrollment pipelines, and maintain communication with prospective parents and students.

items.experience: 1-2 years in school or college laboratory support
items.title: Lab Assistant (Science)
items.description: Manage lab inventory, prepare practical sessions, and enforce safety and documentation standards for Physics, Chemistry, and Biology labs.

items.experience: 3+ years in HR operations and recruitment
items.qualification: MBA/PGDM in HR or related field
items.title: Human Resource Executive
items.description: Support talent acquisition, onboarding, and employee lifecycle management with a focus on building a values-driven academic workplace.

items.experience: 2-5 years teaching coding and computer science
items.qualification: B.Tech/B.E. (Computer Science) or MCA with B.Ed
items.title: Computer Science Teacher
items.description: Teach foundational and advanced computer science concepts, mentor coding projects, and support technology-enabled classroom innovation.
